headline: Ivonescimab Receives Major Recommendations Across Multiple Therapies in the 2026 CSCO NSCLC Guideline
summary: Akeso, Inc. (9926.HK) ("Akeso" or the "Company") today announced that ivonescimab, the company's first-in-class PD-1/VEGF bispecific antibody, has secured multiple authoritative updates and upgrades across first-line and later-line settings in the officially updated 2026 Chinese Society of Clinical Oncology (CSCO) Guideline for the Diagnosis and Treatment of Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer (NSCLC). These strong recommendations further solidify ivonescimab's breakthrough clinical value and its positio
